comment: Hardware specification for building the Tpo (Indicator) component flip-flop-level from the netlist-generator (emitter-first workflow). (auto-generated from PARTS_LIST)

config_nodes.name: DOM_BID_QTY
config_nodes.comment: Bid quantity per price level (indexed by PRICE_IDX)

config_nodes.name: DOM_ASK_QTY
config_nodes.comment: Ask quantity per price level (indexed by PRICE_IDX)

config_nodes.name: DOM_TIME
config_nodes.comment: Latest TAI timestamp per price level

dff_nodes.name: TPO_PREV_TAI
dff_nodes.comment: last TAI processed (subtrahend for elapsed-time, arch §2)

dff_nodes.name: TPO_BAR_POC_TOTAL
dff_nodes.comment: total accumulated time at the running POC level (arch §2)

dff_nodes.name: TPO_BID_TIME
dff_nodes.comment: cumulative bid-side time at the active price level (arch §2)

dff_nodes.name: TPO_ASK_TIME
dff_nodes.comment: cumulative ask-side time at the active price level (arch §2)

dff_nodes.name: TPO_LAST_TF_SEQ
dff_nodes.comment: last timeframe bar sequence seen (bar-boundary detect, arch §2)

dff_nodes.name: TPO_BAR_PARITY
dff_nodes.comment: virtual-reset parity tag (flips on bar close, arch §2)

comb_nodes.name: TPO_TIME_DELTA
comb_nodes.comment: elapsed = FIFO_RX_TAI - TPO_PREV_TAI (sub) — ns since previous edge (arch §3.1)

comb_nodes.name: TPO_MIN_MAX
comb_nodes.comment: active = (DOM_TIME == FIFO_RX_TAI); selects the live price level (arch §3.2/§3.3)

comb_nodes.name: TPO_TIME_ACCUMULATE
comb_nodes.comment: charge = elapsed if level active this tick, else 0 (arch §3.2)

comb_nodes.name: BID_ASK_SPLIT
comb_nodes.comment: bid_charge = charge if bid event, else 0; ask = complement (arch §3.5)
